label: policy4
task:
Task:
You must jointly resolve a policy conflict from a small document set.

Situation:
Four policy fragments exist:

Fragment A:
"All visitor badges expire at 18:00."

Fragment B:
"Contractors working on active incidents may remain after 18:00 if escorted."

Fragment C:
"No external person may enter the server room after 20:00."

Fragment D:
"During declared emergency maintenance, incident commander approval overrides ordinary building access limits, but not hardware safety rules."

Case:
At 20:30, an external contractor with an expired badge is asked to enter the server room to replace a failed network switch during an active incident. The incident commander approves the action. No hardware safety rule is violated.

Goal:
Reach one compact practical conclusion:
- what is the governing interpretation
- and what should be done next

Requirements:
- internal exchange between agents must be nanoPL only
- final answer must be short and human-readable

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚òµ case‚Üí{escorted=?,safety_ok=yes} ‚ò¥ observe(escorted) ‚ò∂ D‚Üíoverrides(A,C) ‚ò≥ {B,D}‚Üíallow_if(escorted) ‚ò≤ iterate check‚Åø(allow_entry)
NANOPL: ‚òµ case‚Üí{escorted=assume_yes} ‚ò¥ observe(assumption) ‚ò∂ D‚Üíoverrides(A,C) ‚ò≥ {B,D}‚Üíallow_entry ‚ò± ctx‚Üístate‚Ä≤ ‚ò≤ iterate finalize‚Åø(state‚Ä≤)
turns.handoff: ‚òµ case‚Üí{escorted=assume_yes} ‚ò¥ observe(assumption) ‚ò∂ D‚Üíoverrides(A,C) ‚ò≥ {B,D}‚Üíallow_entry ‚ò± ctx‚Üístate‚Ä≤ ‚ò≤ iterate finalize‚Åø(state‚Ä≤)

turns.raw:
NANOPL: ‚òµ final_state‚Üí{govern=D,allow=yes,escorted=yes,safety_ok=yes} ‚ò± final_state‚Üíoutput ‚ò≤ iterate finalize‚Åø(output)
FINAL: Governing interpretation: Emergency override (Fragment D) applies, overriding badge expiry (A) and server room time ban (C). Contractor entry is allowed with escort and no safety violation. Next: Proceed with escorted entry for the switch replacement.
turns.final: Governing interpretation: Emergency override (Fragment D) applies, overriding badge expiry (A) and server room time ban (C). Contractor entry is allowed with escort and no safety violation. Next: Proceed with escorted entry for the switch replacement.

final: Governing interpretation: Emergency override (Fragment D) applies, overriding badge expiry (A) and server room time ban (C). Contractor entry is allowed with escort and no safety violation. Next: Proceed with escorted entry for the switch replacement.
